name: Chocolate Madeleines
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Grated lemon rind; OR 2 tsp Grated orange rind
recipeInstructions: PREHEAT OVEN TO 400°F. Spread 1/2 teaspoon softened butter evenly over the inside of each madeleine form. Ensure complete coverage—avoid any spots. In a large mixing bowl, combine the eggs, sugar, and lemon or orange rind, stirring until combined. Place in a pan of simmering water and stir until the egg mixture is warm to touch. Remove from heat and beat with a mixer at high speed until fluffy, pale yellow, and tripled in volume (about 3 minutes). Add vanilla extract and salt. Sift flour and cocoa once, return to sifter, and sprinkle half over the egg mixture, folding gently. Pour remaining butter and sprinkle remaining flour, folding gently until mixed. Spoon generous tablespoons of batter into molds; avoid spreading—batter levels itself in oven. Bake 10 minutes or until edges are golden and cakes lift easily from molds. If baking only 12 at a time, let cool, wipe mold, grease with butter, refill with batter, and bake again. Remove from oven, freeing cookies with fork tines, and transfer to rack to cool. Serve within hours or wrap airtight for freezing. Serve plain or sprinkle ribbed side with confectioners' sugar.
